{"id":"smallhold-6nz","title":"Fetch actor document, parse to RemoteAccount, upsert in DB","description":"Given an actor URI, fetch the document (signed GET), parse the AP Person/Service/Application object, upsert into remote_accounts table. Extract: username (preferredUsername), domain (from actor URI), display_name, bio_html (sanitize with ammonia), avatar_url, header_url, public_key_pem (from publicKey.publicKeyPem), public_key_id, inbox_url, shared_inbox_url (from endpoints.sharedInbox), followers_url, is_locked, bot.

Agent workflow: Spawn a research subagent to fetch actor documents from mastodon.social, GoToSocial, and Misskey and document the structural differences. Spawn a testing subagent to write parse tests against those fixture documents.

Test discipline:
- Parse fixture documents from mastodon.social, GoToSocial, Misskey, Lemmy — verify each field extracted correctly
- Test malformed actor document (missing publicKey): returns clear error, does not insert partial row
- Test actor with only inbox (no sharedInbox): shared_inbox_url is NULL, inbox_url is set
- Test bot=true detection: type=Service or manuallyApprovesFollowers present

Defensive programming:
- Sanitize bio_html with ammonia before storage — remote HTML is untrusted
- Validate public_key_pem is a valid PEM before storage — don't store garbage that will fail signature verification later
- last_fetched_at must always be updated on successful fetch
- On fetch failure: increment fetch_fail_count, set fetched_failed_at, do NOT update last_fetched_at","acceptance_criteria":"Parses fixture documents from mastodon.social and GoToSocial correctly; bio HTML sanitized; malformed documents don't create partial rows; fetch failures tracked in DB","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-04-23T00:30:00Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-04-23T00:30:00Z","metadata":{},"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-e8g","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T17:30:07Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
